positive: Minimalist woodland spirit silhouette, featuring graceful forest creatures like deer, foxes, and birds intertwined with blooming flowers and delicate vines. The scene must have strong, clean black silhouettes against a muted, gradient watercolor background of moss green, deep indigo, and pale cream. The composition should be vertically balanced, highly stylized, suitable for apparel printing, with clean edges and visible negative space. Vector art style, highly detailed line work, ethereal, nature aesthetic, maximum contrast, centered.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, watermarks, low resolution, text, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, jpeg artifacts
